ab: maki squ 2022 kawas ga, melahuy mrhuw mkayal na Mibunsyo ga swalan miru na lalu Tayal.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: pqutan maku lhani mkura mrhuw msina ssyun lalu tayal Mibunsyo ka qutux mrkyas Yumin Nawi.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Yumin Nawi。
en: I interviewed Yumin Nawi, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: wal sami rima smun hngaw ryax ga musa saku ngasal nya maqut hiya.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: trang saku maqut ga, skayal saku nya minkahul inu qu lalu nya, mqbaq sami ki squliq nqu ngasal nya uziy, ru qalang nya.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: kyalun maku swa su si ginrhuw ’myuw lalu, yaqih qu sinllwan raral hiya ga?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: smyuk mha, baha hmswa ini ’ruyu sbiru lalu thiluw lalu maku tayal, si saku nha ryaxiy nha “yu sen sung”, nanu psyaqan saku nha.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「尤先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Yu Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: kmayal Yumin Nawi mha, sbiru lalu tayal ga yasa qu balay nya, lalu maku tayal ga nyux mkin_giwan ita qutux mtgluw ita qutux ngasal ru sinrxan ta, aki hmswa kbzihay ta lalu ta nanak.
ch: Yunim Nawi 說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Yumin Nawi said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
